data_source: GeoTecINIT/stability-csi-har (GitHub) — 'Temporal Stability on Human Activity Recognition based on Wi-Fi CSI'. D1-D4 labelled datasets, 32 recording files across 4 environments. Shape per file: (n_windows, 56 subcarriers, 50 timesteps). 6 activity types: sit, stand, walk, pick up, wave, jump.
encoding_notes: Per-subcarrier encoding: each of 56 subcarriers treated as independent time series. Global quantile bins (20 equal-occupancy) computed across all windows and subcarriers combined. Windows concatenated within each recording+subcarrier pair; sequences then pooled (no cross-subcarrier joins). Stream truncated to 1,000,000 chars. Canonical measure is per-subcarrier mean structure score (analogous to bioreactor per-channel). Pooled stream score also reported.
